StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT clmns.name AS [Name] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.all_columns AS clmns ON clmns.object_id=tbl.object_id WHERE (CAST(clmns.is_sparse AS bit)=@_msparam_0 and (ISNULL(clmns.graph_type, 0)=@_msparam_1 or ISNULL(clmns.graph_type, 0)=@_msparam_2 or ISNULL(clmns.graph_type, 0)=@_msparam_3 or ISNULL(clmns.graph_type, 0)=@_msparam_4))and((tbl.name=@_msparam_5 and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id)=@_msparam_6)) ORDER BY clmns.column_id ASC

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

isnull(CONVERT(int,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value],0),(0))=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[@_msparam_1],0) OR isnull(CONVERT(int,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value],0),(0))=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[@_msparam_2],0) OR isnull(CONVERT(int,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value],0),(0))=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[@_msparam_3],0) OR isnull(CONVERT(int,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value],0),(0))=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,[@_msparam_4],0)

([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))
